title: taraxacum russum
intro: Taraxacum russum, also known as the Dandelion plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The roots and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum russum include treating digestive issues, lowering blood pressure, and reducing liver and kidney damage. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
